tensor_core.description: Blackwell Tensor Core supporting FP4, FP8, BF16, FP16, and TF32 precision with adaptive transformer engine.

bottleneck_analysis.bottleneck: FP4/FP8 quantization scaling and adaptive Transformer Engine overhead.
bottleneck_analysis.description: Blackwell’s 5th-gen Tensor Cores dynamically switch between FP4, FP8, and BF16. The on-chip scaling metadata and precision adaptation logic introduce pipeline bubbles when precision boundaries shift between layers, slightly reducing sustained TFLOPS efficiency despite high peak throughput.
bottleneck_analysis.workload_characteristic: Mixed-precision Transformer workloads with per-layer FP4↔FP8 transitions or adaptive quantization during training and inference.
